channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Unknown languages (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Unknown languages nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🦀 ultraworkers/claw-code (187940 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ultraworkers

📝 Repository: ultraworkers/claw-code

📄 Descrizione: The repo is finally unlocked. enjoy the party! The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Join Discord: https://discord.gg/5TUQKqFWd Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.

⭐ Stelle: 187940

🍴 Forks: 109245

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-31T08:58:08Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-24T04:53:10Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🟦 JackChen-me/open-multi-agent (5862 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: JackChen-me

📝 Repository: JackChen-me/open-multi-agent

📄 Descrizione: TypeScript multi-agent orchestration engine — one runTeam() call from goal to result. Multi-model teams, auto task decomposition, parallel execution. 3 runtime dependencies.

⭐ Stelle: 5862

🍴 Forks: 2300

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: agent-framework ai-agents anthropic claude deepseek gemini grok llm local-llm mcp model-agnostic multi-agent nodejs ollama openai orchestration structured-output task-scheduling tool-use typescript

📜 Licenza: MIT License
